title: Angela Rayner, Former U.K. Deputy Prime Minister, Cleared of Wrongdoing Over Taxes
summary_full: Angela Rayner, who resigned last year after paying the wrong rate of tax on an apartment purchase, said an investigation found she had not done so deliberately.
summary_public: Angela Rayner, who resigned last year after paying the wrong rate of tax on an apartment purchase, said an investigation found she had not done so deliberately.
